message:
fix(clippy): remove redundant numeric conversions and unused-variable prefixes

src/lab/http/harness.rs:
- Remove redundant u16::from(class) call — class is already u16, so the
  conversion was a no-op that triggered clippy::useless_conversion

src/obligation/eprocess.rs:
- Remove two redundant u64::from(self.config.min_observations) calls — the
  field is already u64, making the from() calls identity conversions that
  trigger clippy warnings

src/runtime/state.rs:
- Rename _idx → idx, _idx_root → idx_root, _idx_child → idx_child,
  _idx_grandchild → idx_grandchild in test helper code — these variables
  ARE used on the very next line (passed to add_task), so the underscore
  prefix was misleading and triggers clippy::used_underscore_binding

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
